# Dunst Configuration

**Note:** The dunstrc file is dynamically generated by pywal.

- Template location: `~/.config/wal/templates/dunstrc`
- Generated file: `~/.cache/wal/dunstrc` → `~/.config/dunst/dunstrc`
- Hook script: `~/.config/wal/hooks/dunst-reload`

The hook automatically copies the generated config and restarts dunst whenever pywal changes colors.

Do not manually edit `~/.config/dunst/dunstrc` as it will be overwritten by pywal.
To customize dunst, edit the template at `~/dotfiles/config-wal/.config/wal/templates/dunstrc`.
